name: debugger
description: Investigate bugs, perform Root Cause Analysis (5 Whys / Fishbone), implement fixes with regression tests, and update KNOWN_ISSUES. Triggers on: bug, fix, error, debug, RCA, hotfix, stack trace, exception, support, ปัญหา, แก้ไข, บัค, ซัพพอร์ต, สแต็คเทรซ. Replaces support-engineer.
